description: You are an Aviation Facilities Planner at Global Airways, designing the new 'Horizon Club' VIP lounge in Terminal 4. Transform the open terminal space into a premium frequent-flyer VIP lounge by constructing at least four partition walls to define and name at least four distinct rooms (e.g., Reception, Dining, Business, Lounge). The lounge must be furnished to include a Reception area with at least 2 desks/counters; a Dining & Buffet area with at least 4 tables, 8 chairs, and 2 kitchen appliances; a Business Center with at least 4 desks and 3 bookcases; a Relaxation Lounge with at least 6 seats, 2 TVs, and 4 decorative plants; and Washrooms with at least 3 toilets and 3 sinks. Save the updated floor plan over the starter file and export a 3D photo rendering of the lounge interior to ~/Desktop/lounge_render.png.
